value.found_quote: Optional fields such as `nickname_candidates`, `model`, `model_reasoning_effort`, `sandbox_mode`, `mcp_servers`, and `skills.config` inherit from the parent session when you omit them.
value.rationale: The page describes per-agent model and reasoning configuration: each custom agent can specify a `model` and `model_reasoning_effort` field, or inherit (auto-select from parent) when omitted. Examples show pinned values like model = "gpt-5.4" and model_reasoning_effort = "high". Subagent workflows are enabled by default in current releases (active).
